name: My Heroic Husband
overview: Ning Yi, a determined woman from a cold background, grows through poetry, business, and martial arts, taking on increasing responsibilities and, with the help of her friends and family, using courage and wisdom to protect Lin An.

trailers.title: Clip: The First Night Of The Newlyweds | My Heroic Husband EP06 | 赘婿 | iQiyi
